name: HR teams in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll submissions/week tool
description: For HR teams in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll submissions/week, missing entries cause compliance issues. We alert HR teams instead of manual tracking of payroll submissions.
target_audience: HR teams in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll submissions/week
